source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Figure A shows the waveform of a sinusoidal transverse wave at \( t = 0.20\,\mathrm{s} \). Point \( P \) is a particle whose equilibrium position is at \( x = 1.0\,\mathrm{m} \), point \( Q \) is at \( x = 4.0\,\mathrm{m} \), and point \( M \) is at \( x = 8.0\,\mathrm{m} \). Figure B shows the vibration graph of particle \( M \). What is the speed of the wave?
